governing_metric: worst-group WER and min-max parity gap

blockers: run tiny train-to-score first and record worst-group WER before parity optimization
licensed training audio missing for selected worst cells
required_receipt_fields: failure example from the worst group

license_summary.summary: 353 manifest rows; licenses=['CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0']; redistributable=['no']; score-and-cite only when redistributable includes 'no'

release_expectation.reason: selected worst cells have no ledgered training hours

commands.run_cycle_command: .venv/bin/babel run-cycle archive/ledger.sqlite eval/baseline/studio_tiny_full_seed_13.metrics.json --experiment-id studio_tiny_full_seed_13_2026_07_08 --exact-command 'SEED=13 PYTHONHASHSEED=13 .venv/bin/python scripts/local_scout_distill.py --device mps --teacher openai/whisper-large-v3-turbo --student openai/whisper-tiny --mini-shards 0 --epochs 3 --batch-size 4 --lr 3e-06 --encoder-lr 1e-06 --save-every 100 --log-every 10 --max-seconds 0 --ckpt models/studio_tiny_full_seed_13; .venv/bin/python scripts/local_eval.py --model models/studio_tiny_full_seed_13/stage_a_flagship --tag studio_tiny_full_seed_13 --device mps --limit 0' --component acoustic_distillation_studio --hypothesis 'Studio tiny seed 13 must improve worst-group WER or be recorded as non-release evidence.' --split 'full held-out eval; score-and-cite benchmark manifest' --license-summary '353 manifest rows; licenses=[CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0]; redistributable=[no]; score-and-cite only when redistributable includes no' --previous-json eval/baseline/tiny_baseline.metrics.json --heldout-jsonl eval/baseline/studio_tiny_full_seed_13.held_out.jsonl --output-receipt benchmark/receipts/studio_tiny_full_seed_13_2026_07_08.experiment.json --decision reject_unless_release_gate_passes
commands.train_command: SEED=13 PYTHONHASHSEED=13 .venv/bin/python scripts/local_scout_distill.py --device mps --teacher openai/whisper-large-v3-turbo --student openai/whisper-tiny --mini-shards 0 --epochs 3 --batch-size 4 --lr 3e-06 --encoder-lr 1e-06 --save-every 100 --log-every 10 --max-seconds 0 --ckpt models/studio_tiny_full_seed_13

parity_gap must not regress against previous baseline
quality cards must exist for every scored accent family
babel_loses_here.md must add or preserve failure rows
